prestazioni: AMG M158 6.0L V12 biturbo (engine code: M158 EVO) upgraded with a bespoke Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ hybrid turbo system featuring Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, billet compressor wheels, and 1.22 A/R turbine housings for optimized spool and 1,050+ HP capability on E85 fuel

Full titanium 4.25-inch straight-pipe exhaust system by Capristo with electronically actuated bypass valves, Inconel 625 headers, and a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with GESI high-flow metallic core units for emissions compliance in select markets)

Pagani-specific Bosch Motorsport MS 25.4 ECU reflash with custom Motec PDM30 power distribution module, integrating a dual-stage launch control system (0-100 km/h in 2.2s) and a 12,000 RPM rev limiter extension via upgraded valvetrain components (titanium retainers, sodium-filled valves, and DLC-coated camshafts by Schrick)
estetica: Full carbon-fiber Tempesta Evo aero package by Pagani Automobili, including a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via hydraulic actuators), a rear diffuser with integrated twin-plane vortex generators, and a fixed rear wing with NACA ducts for brake cooling

Custom Brembo GT-RS 10-piston monobloc calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic discs (upgraded from standard 400mm) and Pagani-specific titanium brake lines, paired with OZ Racing UltraLeggera HLT wheels (20x9.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear)

Exterior livery by Foglizzo Leather & Carbon, featuring a bespoke 'Tempesta Storm' matte titanium weave carbon fiber with hand-painted argentum metallic accents, including a one-off Pagani crest on the hood with 24K gold inlays and laser-etched 'Evo' badging on the C-pillars
